name: Crossref Metadata Search
tagline: Search scholarly metadata, DOIs, journals, and funders indexed by Crossref
description: Query Crossref's open bibliographic database for journal articles, books, and other scholarly works, including DOIs, authors, publishers, licenses, and citation counts. No account or credential is required for standard public access.

auth.hint: No credential required. Optionally send a mailto query parameter (e.g. mailto=you@example.org) with each request to join Crossref's polite pool for more reliable response times; this is a contact identifier, not a secret.

tools.name: search_works
tools.description: Search Crossref's full catalog of scholarly works by free-text query, returning matching DOIs, titles, authors, and publication metadata.

params.name: query
params.description: Free-text search across all bibliographic fields, e.g. "machine learning".

params.name: query.bibliographic
params.description: Combined search across title, author, ISSN/ISBN, and year; replaces the deprecated query.title field.

params.name: rows
params.description: Number of results to return per page (default 20, maximum 1000).

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination (offset-based paging is limited to the first 10,000 results).

params.name: sort
params.description: Field to sort by, e.g. relevance, published, is-referenced-by-count.

params.name: mailto
params.description: Contact email to join the polite pool for more reliable performance, e.g. you@example.org.

tools.name: get_work
tools.description: Retrieve full bibliographic metadata for a single scholarly work by its DOI.

params.name: mailto
params.description: Contact email to join the polite pool, e.g. you@example.org.

tools.name: list_journal_works
tools.description: List scholarly works published in a specific journal identified by ISSN.

params.name: rows
params.description: Number of results to return per page (default 20, maximum 1000).

params.name: mailto
params.description: Contact email to join the polite pool, e.g. you@example.org.

tools.name: get_funder
tools.description: Retrieve metadata for a funding organization registered in Crossref's Funder Registry, identified by its Funder ID.

params.name: funder_id
params.description: Crossref Funder Registry identifier, e.g. 100000001 for the U.S. National Science Foundation.

tools.name: get_member
tools.description: Retrieve metadata for a Crossref member (publisher), identified by its member ID.
